title: Multi-player comparison (3+ players)
description: Extend comparison tool to support 3-4 player comparisons. Radar chart with multiple overlays (color-coded by team). Tabular view with sortable columns. Group comparison by role (e.g., compare all team openers, all death bowlers).
deferred_reason: Sprint 5 close-out: Depends on TKT-217 (2-player comparison UI) which is itself deferred. Chain dependency — cannot execute until comparison foundation exists. Sprint 6 P1.

2026-02-28T00:00:00Z.detail: Deferred to Sprint 6. Chain blocked: TKT-218 ← TKT-217 ← TKT-216. Natural Sprint 6 follow-on after 2-player comparison ships.
